name: Clam Chowder-- Maine Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onions and salt pork.
2. Sauté slowly in an iron frying pan.
3. Empty into a chowder pan.
4. Add water (about 1 quart) and bring to a boil.
5. Add potatoes and return to a boil.
6. Grind clams through a meat grinder.
7. Add ground clams to the pot.
8. Simmer until done, adding salt and pepper.
9. Stir in evaporated milk before serving.
10. Heat again just before serving.
11. Serve with crackers.
